description: Skill description templates — controls skill UI layout, icon, description text, damage display, and synergy tooltip lines. Referenced by the skilldesc column in Skills.txt.

skilldesc.description: Skill description identifier, referenced by Skills.txt skilldesc column. Not read by 1.13c engine

SkillPage.description: Skill tree page (1 = left, 2 = middle, 3 = right, 0 = not shown). Not read by 1.13c engine

SkillRow.description: Skill tree row position (0-6, top to bottom). Not read by 1.13c engine

SkillColumn.description: Skill tree column position (0-2, left to right). Not read by 1.13c engine

ListRow.description: Skill list display row for right-click skill menu. Not read by 1.13c engine

ListPool.description: Skill list pool grouping for right-click skill menu. Not read by 1.13c engine

iconcel.description: Skill icon cell index in the skill icon DC6 file

str name.description: String table key for skill display name

str short.description: String table key for short skill description. Not read by 1.13c engine

str long.description: String table key for long/detailed skill description. Not read by 1.13c engine

str alt.description: String table key for alternate skill description. Not read by 1.13c engine

str mana.description: String table key for mana cost display text. Not read by 1.13c engine

descdam.description: Damage display mode (1=attack, 2=kick, 3=throw, 4-24=various skill damage types)

p1dmelem.description: Primary damage element type 1. Not read by 1.13c engine

p1dmmin.description: Primary damage 1 minimum value calculation. Not read by 1.13c engine

p1dmmax.description: Primary damage 1 maximum value calculation. Not read by 1.13c engine

p2dmelem.description: Primary damage element type 2. Not read by 1.13c engine

p2dmmin.description: Primary damage 2 minimum value calculation. Not read by 1.13c engine

p2dmmax.description: Primary damage 2 maximum value calculation. Not read by 1.13c engine

p3dmelem.description: Primary damage element type 3. Not read by 1.13c engine

p3dmmin.description: Primary damage 3 minimum value calculation. Not read by 1.13c engine

p3dmmax.description: Primary damage 3 maximum value calculation. Not read by 1.13c engine

descatt.description: Attack rating display mode for character screen

desctexta1.description: Description line 1 text key A (string table). Not read by 1.13c engine

desctextb1.description: Description line 1 text key B (string table). Not read by 1.13c engine

desccalca1.description: Description line 1 calculation formula A. Not read by 1.13c engine

desccalcb1.description: Description line 1 calculation formula B. Not read by 1.13c engine

dsc2textb1.description: Current level description line 1 text key B. Not read by 1.13c engine

dsc2calca1.description: Current level description line 1 calculation A. Not read by 1.13c engine

dsc2calcb1.description: Current level description line 1 calculation B. Not read by 1.13c engine
